specs:
"Color Profile: A deep, profound black with a subtle purplish tint, also described as a purple-black (shikonkei kuro).
Characteristics: It is made from pure oil soot and a unique manufacturing process results in ultra-fine particles, giving it a rich, elegant black color. It is a glue-based (nikawa) ink.
Usage: It is designed for use in artistic works (sakuhin-yō), providing a glossy, profound black finish that deeply penetrates the paper. "
